column:name: # ^ Tier-A0 schema overlay (mod_overrides.md §3). This expansion package is a
# ^ mod on tutorial.core; here it widens core Item.tsv's `price` column without
# ^ forking the file. `price` is `gold` (an alias for uint) in core, so it
# ^ rejects negative values; a "permissive prices" mod widens it to `gold|int`
# ^ so a later discount/debt patch could declare negative prices. Widening is
# ^ safe by construction: every value valid as `gold` is still valid as
# ^ `gold|int`, so no existing core row stops parsing. The overlay only loosens.
